checks.name: api

No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: structure

Poor accessibility: only 130/208 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found

Likely a client-side SPA — minimal server-rendered content
Good heading hierarchy: 41 headings, well-structured
2 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 184/186 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 403 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~372,842 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 0% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 24 — moderately nested
Reading this page costs $0.47–$5.59 per load ($2.33–$27.96 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region
All 120 images have alt attributes (98 descriptive, 22 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 5 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
3 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

Moderate payload: 204KB
